name: Community Healthcare Trust Inc
business: Community Healthcare Trust Inc is a fully-integrated healthcare real estate company that owns and acquires properties leased to hospitals, doctors, healthcare systems, or other healthcare service providers.

exposures.sentence: We own and acquire real estate properties that are leased to hospitals, doctors, healthcare systems or other healthcare service providers.

catalysts.event: Closing of one property in acquisition pipeline
catalysts.sentence: The Company anticipates closing on one of these properties in the first quarter of 2026 with the remainder throughout 2026 and 2027;

catalysts.event: Remaining properties in acquisition pipeline to close
catalysts.sentence: The Company anticipates closing on one of these properties in the first quarter of 2026 with the remainder throughout 2026 and 2027;

catalysts.event: Sale of property classified as held for sale
catalysts.sentence: On February 12, 2026, the Company sold the property classified as an asset held for sale at December 31, 2025 and received net proceeds of approximately $5.2 million.
